/usr/bin/c++      CMakeFiles/ttl_debug_tools.dir/src/ttl_debug.cpp.o  -o /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/ttl_debug_tools/ttl_debug_tools -rdynamic /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libttl_debug_tools_core.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libdynamixel_sdk.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libserial.so -lboost_program_options -lpthread -lrt -lwiringPi -lrt -lcrypt -lpthread -Wl,-rpath,/home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib:
